title: Notification dated 23.03.2005 under the Government of Union Territories Act, 1963
description: Notification dated 23.03.2005 under the Government of Union Territories Act, 1963
file_title: Notification dated 23.03.2005 under the Government of Union Territories Act, 1963.pdf
text: (TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE PONDICHERRY GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY) GOVERNMENT OF INDIA (BHARAT SARKAR) MTNSITRY OF HOME AFFAIRS (GRIH MANTRALAYA) New Delhi, the& March, 2005. NOTIFICATION In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section(3) of Section 3 of the Government of Union Territories Act, 1963( 20 of 1963), the Central Government hereby nominates the following persons to be Members of the Legislative Assembly of the Union Territory of Pondicherry, namely :- (1) SMT. MARY THERESA (2) SHRI S. ANNAMALAIREDDIYAR (3) SHRI N. KALAINATHAN [F.NO.U-11012/2/2005-UTL] ( J"4 K . S . SUffiATHAN) JOINT SECRETARY TO THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA. -- 1 of 1 --
